• Implementedautomatedmodelevaluationworkflows(cross-validation,hyperparametertuning,precision/recalltrack-
ing) to improve model robustness and reduce false positives

Cnotes.in - Founder, Lead Engineer May 2019 – Aug 2021

records efficiently. Implemented role-based authentication and input sanitization to prevent injection vulnerabilities

idempotent transaction processing, and audit-ready event logs for payment confirmations and renewals

Instruction Tuning Dataset Generator for StarCoder2-15B | Python, Flask, Docker New Jersey, USA
• Designedandimplementedasyntheticinstruction-tuningpipelineforStarCoder2-15B,generatinghigh-qualitytrain-
ing data through prompt orchestration and automated validation workflows
• Refactored&extendedthecodebasefromStackv1tosupportmulti-languageparsinganddynamicpromptformatting
• Designedandimplementedaretrieval-augmentedgeneration(RAG)systemcombiningvectorsearch,promptorches-
tration, and self-validation to power accurate, low-latency conversational responses for user-facing AI workflows
Agentic Career Assistant (RAG-based Conversational AI System) | Py, RAG, FAISS New Jersey, USA
• Designed and builta stateful, agentic conversational AI system to help usersanalyze resumes, discover relevant jobs,
map skills to opportunities, prepare for interviews, and track progress over time
• BuiltaRetrieval-AugmentedGeneration(RAG)pipelineincludingdocumentchunking,embeddinggeneration,vector
indexing, and similarity-based retrieval to ground responses in structured and unstructured career data
• Generated embeddings in sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) & indexed vectors in FAISS for retrieval
• Tuned retrieval quality and latency through chunk-size and similarity threshold optimization; implemented drift
monitoring and retraining triggers to maintain model performance
• DeployedinferenceusingvLLMonGPU-backedinstances,optimizingtokenthroughputandreducingresponselatency
by 30% via batching and prompt optimization

Detecting Diabetic Retinopathy using Deep Learning — Tensorflow, Django, Python Published Link
• Developed a model for diabetic retinopathy detection using Fully convolutional Neural Network, with 93% accuracy

(FAISS), prompt orchestration, model evaluation, MLflow, drift monitoring, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn
Languages: Python, Java, SQL, TypeScript
